programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Martin Daubney - Episode 286

programme.title: Could some birth-control methods kill you? | Life on Mars? Nasa's Hawaiian dome
programme.desc: Sweetening the pill: could some birth-control methods kill you? | The Hawaiian dome where Nasa prepares humanity for life on Mars

programme.title: Inside the strange world of NFTs
programme.desc: Celebrities, sports people, politicians – anyone and everyone seems to be getting into NFTs. These non-fungible tokens (NFTs) have changed the business of buying, selling and owning art and digital property, and 'collectibles' like 'Bored Apes' have sold for millions online. Many say they are buying these images to be part of a community and because they love the art. But, in reality, how much of this is a speculative bubble that could soon burst?

programme.title: The Age of Stupid revisited: what's changed on climate change? | My mission to understand insomnia
programme.desc: The Age of Stupid revisited: what's changed on climate change? | Why can't I sleep? My mission to understand insomnia

programme.title: Behind the scenes on Birmingham derby day with football fans and police
programme.desc: Police on the streets separating rival supporters, cordons restricting access around the ground, holding the away end back after full time: these are familiar experiences for football fans attending derbies up and down the country. Here we go behind the scenes at Birmingham City v Aston Villa to explore how police and fans interact with each other on match day

programme.title: The women feeding Liverpool from an ice-cream van | 'Fed up of politics': the view from Blackpool on byelection day
programme.desc: Michelle Roach bought a used ice-cream van in order to bring cheap, affordable food to Liverpool's struggling communities. She wanted a vehicle with freezers built in for frozen food, and also something cheerful that was able to break down stigmas around food poverty. | Ahead of the byelection in Blackpool South, the Guardian takes the temperature in the once prosperous northern coastal town, with many voters expressing complete apathy and disdain for the state of politics.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.sub-title: interviews President Zelenskiy | The Taiwanese civilians training for a Chinese invasion
programme.desc: In an exclusive interview with the Guardian, the Ukrainian president, Volodymyr Zelenskiy, revealed the tactics and traits that help him face the daily frustrations of leading a country at war for more than two years. Within a ceremonial room inside Kyiv's presidential compound, Zelenskiy spoke for nearly an hour with a Guardian team, including the editor-in-chief, Katharine Viner. | Kuo Chiu, known as KC to his friends, teaches urban design at Tunghai University in Taiwan. He's also one of many of the country's citizens who practises rifle skills in his spare time, in case of a Chinese invasion.

programme.title: Trapped in a city of a thousand mountains
programme.desc: A new phenomenon has taken the internet by storm: Chinese rap. But behind its skyrocketing popularity, there is a struggle for freedom of speech. Rappers try to figure out what they can and cannot say after more censorship is announced. In Chongqing, one of China's biggest cities, surveillance is unavoidable. Announcements echo across the vast squares warning that “morally suspect individuals” are banned from speaking in public.

programme.title: Inside Out: Indigenous imprisonment in Australia
programme.desc: Filmed on the plains of north-western New South Wales, this documentary looks at one man's fight against the scourge of Indigenous imprisonment in his community. Inside Out tells the story of a pastor and former prison guard, Uncle Isaac Gordon, whose dream is to see the numbers of Aboriginal youths heading to jail slashed. Gordon wants to build a 'healing centre' for troubled Aboriginal young people at risk of jail time, built on his family's ancestral land near the towns of Brewarrina and Walgett. But will government bodies get on board?

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Blood, sweat and fears: special report on abuse towards grassroots football referees
programme.desc: The FA has rebooted its Respect Campaign this season to protect grassroots referees in England but many continue to suffer both mental and physical abuse. There are some horrifying stories but hope remains: as of 2019-20 season a new sin-bin system will be rolled out across all grassroots leagues for anybody caught abusing a referee, with other initiatives also in the pipeline.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In Juchitán, Mexico, muxes – children identified as male at birth, but who choose at a young age to be raised as female – are embraced as part of the community.

programme.title: Sprinter Factory
programme.desc: These are the girls running as fast as they can to be Jamaica's new sprint champions in a country obsessed with its athletes. This is the story of the Champs national youth athletics competition that could change their lives.

programme.title: If you're only dating someone for their skin colour, you should consider why | Conectifai
programme.desc: Swipe my race: 'If you're only dating someone for their skin colour, you should consider why' | Conectifai

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: YouTube kids: how unboxing, gaming and toy reviews took over
programme.desc: Being a YouTuber is now the most popular aspiration for children today, according to a survey. In 2018, the site's highest earner was a seven-year-old American toy reviewer. But the video platform has been mired in controversy over its failure to protect children. Richard Sprenger meets some of the children plying their trade on YouTube, viral sensation Rebecca Black, and visits a Los Angeles summer camp where kids as young as six learn the tricks of the trade

programme.title: The Tower next door
programme.desc: In June 2017 residents of the Silchester estate woke to discover Grenfell Tower engulfed in flames, witnessing a terrifying national tragedy unfolding on their doorstep. The tower bore a striking resemblance to their own. The victims were people they knew, people from all walks of life who, like them, made a home for themselves high up above the clamour of the city. Faced with an uncertain future, the residents of the tower next door are fighting to rebuild their community.

programme.title: Flat Earth: meet the people casting aside 2,500 years of science
programme.desc: Though not a new phenomenon, flat Earth theory has enjoyed a huge resurgence recently. A YouGov poll indicated that a third of Americans aged 18 to 24 were unsure of the shape of our planet, in spite of scientific proofs from Pythagoras to Nasa. Why has this happened now, and what does it tell us about society today?

programme.title: The Climate and the Cross
programme.desc: An internal battle is simmering among US Christians over whether climate change is a call to protect the Earth, the work of God to be welcomed, or does not exist at all.

programme.title: Selling Ireland's Most Exclusive Homes

programme.desc: Jerry feels responsible for his aunt's untimely death.

programme.title: Seinfeld S2E3

programme.desc: Romance starts to blossom between George and his former college classmate Diane, after Jerry falsely tells her that George is a successful marine biologist. Meanwhile, Elaine's electronic organizer injures an innocent passerby when it is thrown out of the window of a moving limousine.

programme.title: Seinfeld S5E14

programme.title: Seinfeld S5E15

programme.title: Seinfeld S5E17

programme.title: Seinfeld S5E18

programme.desc: Kristina journeys to Camp Amalinda. Her guide, Dardley, shares some of the history of this World Heritage Site and intriguing rock paintings. They track white rhino on foot and she learns about the distinctive rock formations.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.sub-title: Ivory Safari Lodge and Khulu Lodge" Ivory Safari Lodge and Khulu Lodge
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness a cheetah hunt. Do the cheetah succeed in what they were after?

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.sub-title: Kavinga Safari Camp" Kavinga Safari Camp
programme.desc: Kristina's guide, Andy, treats her to wonderful riverbed drives and wild encounters on foot. An eventful night drive leads them into a potential battle as a coalition of 3 foreign male lions step into the resident king's territory!

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Tianran He and Angela Fu are in historic Datong. Located in northern China's Shanxi Province, some 1500 years ago Datong was the capital of the Northern Wei Dynasty, which saw nomads unite northern China and Buddhism spread throughout the country.

programme.title: Foodwise

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Come get soaked at the Dai people's New Year celebrations! All this before hiking through an actual rainforest. We're going to need all the good tea and food we can get!

programme.desc: While visiting St. Louis, Missouri, Chunz and Makh explore the soulful Blues community and take a turn jookin' and ballroomin' dancing.

programme.title: Unstable
programme.desc: Get ready for the birth of the barn's first foal, which doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Unstable

programme.desc: Drill down on a dad's sheepdog love and meet two other adorable contenders.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Watch Chris assist a turtle and a cormorant who both require urgent attention.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Meet a rare iguana and see three baby koalas get microchipped.

programme.title: Brunei
programme.desc: Brunei may be one of the richest nations in the world, but financial problems have beset even their royal house. The sultan has recently made moves towards some form of partial democracy. However, it is up to him whether or not he introduces it. Why did he make a move to do so, and then let it drop?

programme.title: The Romanovs
programme.desc: No other family has shaped Russia as much as the Romanovs. For three centuries, the tsarist dynasty ruled over the largest country in the world. The Romanovs manifested their power through marriage politics, armed force and dictatorial rigour. Myths and legends surround the ruling dynasty. Great names are associated with them, revered and feared in equal measure.

programme.title: The Queen's Mother in Law
programme.desc: This story, about the extraordinary Princess Alice, sheds more light on how Prince Philip turned out than anything else. Born at Windsor Castle, Alice married into the Greek royal family and continued her close association with the country until her death. She was deaf, courageous and single-minded, but suffered a mental illness that caused her painful separation from her only son, Philip.

programme.title: Diana: The Inquest
programme.desc: The death of Diana, Princess of Wales in August 1997 shocked the world, and left behind a series of mysterious and sinister conspiracy theories. Explore the search for truth in this documentary.

programme.title: The Royal Jewels
programme.desc: Although many of the monarchies of Europe and Russia no longer exist--or exist in a much more ceremonial capacity--their astonishing jewelry still remains and is still worn by the remaining royal families.

programme.title: Bhutan
programme.desc: Bhutan's governing party pledged recently to follow the policies of the absolute monarchy it is replacing, after it won a landslide in the country's first parliamentary elections. This remote, beautiful country truly is in the throes of a noble experiment. What makes this experiment unique is that this move towards democracy has been initiated by the ruling monarch himself.

programme.title: The Future Queen of Denmark
programme.desc: An openhearted portrait of 32-year-old Mary Donaldson, who in May 2004 marries His Royal Highness, Crown Prince Frederik of Denmark - thus becoming a member of one of the oldest monarchies of the world.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.desc: The Smurfs - Squeaky: This is the dramatic, moving story of the friendship between Smurfette and her pet mouse. A sad event reduces Smurfette to tears... Can the Smurfs comfort the despairing Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hats Off To Smurf: In his search for something new, Vanity dons a Gargamel-made magic hat that transforms his face into a mess. Through trickery, Papa Smurf gets the antidote from the wicked wizard and once more, Vanity is beautiful.

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Loss Of Smurfs: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Rose: Smurfette promises Mother Nature that if she creates a blue rose Smurfette will never cut it. But when the white rose becomes blue, Smurfette becomes white. The only way to make Smurfette blue again is for her to cut the rose. She reluctantly cuts the rose, returning nature to normalcy and learning that one cannot always keep a promise.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Gargamel The Generous: In an effort to find out where the Smurfs' secret diamond stash is hidden, Gargamel pretends to be their friend. When he shows his true, wicked self, Papa Smurf works a magic spell to save his little Smurfs from the vicious clutches of the evil wizard.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs… But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Last Laugh: Gargamel has found a new diabolical scheme to get rid of the Smurfs: a glittering powder that is going to reduce them to helpless laughter...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Golden Smurf Award: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Chief Record Smurf: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Locomotive Smurfs: Handy Smurf has hit on a revolutionary new idea: a sort of smurfless carriage that moves on railroad tracks. He calls it a railsmurfer and it makes for less work in the Village... until Gargamel chances upon it.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children play with balls of different shapes and sizes. In Teletubbyland, something happens to Dipsy's hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: A special guest arrives on Sodor with a big surprise and important jobs for Thomas, Percy and James. Then, their bravery is put to the test!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's a bad day on Misty Island. Ol' Wheezy has stopped working! The Logging Locos don't know what to do and that makes them sad. Thomas is sure he can help!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle. (S2 E28)

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Egyptian leg of the World Championships culminates with the final match highlighting F Dynasty against the BBA Revolution. The day before the match, Tyson has Daichi practice moves with him that they're not usually accustomed to doing: namely, tag-team attacks.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson is feeling the pressure of being World Champion. Despite Hiro's warning, a television crew follows him around for a day, taping his every move. Daichi feels jealous and tries to compete for the camera's attention.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The finals have finally arrived and BBA Revolution gets ready to face the Blitzkrieg Boys in a heated battle. But before that can happen, a routine check-up of Tyson's Beyblade turns up a faulty gear assembly, which needs to be repaired!

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi and Tala have both been thrown from the dish at the same time, resulting in a tie game. Because they are in no condition for a rematch, Mr. Dickenson rules that the next match will determine the new tournament Champion.

It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

He knows just the menaces for the job... but someone has to crack the complicated mathematical code - and the only man for the job is Walter. programme.title: Mush-Mush and the Mushables
programme.desc: Mush-Mush wants to be just like Starmush when he grows up, because he's convinced that Starmush is the most awesome Mushable there is and that his daily life must be extraordinary. programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Om Nom is having fun exploring the apps on his smartphone! He can do so many things – from playing with the camera to navigating in the neighbourhood, from sending emojis to playing virtual drums. Even get directions to the nearest yummy apple! / Om Nom is a master of wheels, he rides a skateboard, a scooter, a tricycle and roller skates. His friends are welcome to join the ride too! Even if this would require some adjustments, all problems are solvable! / When it is too hot outside, Om Nom will find ways to cool down and enjoy the sunny weather. He can splash in the water, hide from the sun in the shade, or turn on a fan. Especially if that fan has the power to turn him into a snowman! It's so great when your neighbor is an engineering genius!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: When the weather is unpredictable, Om Nom is predictably unprepared for it. This is when his friends and neighbours come to the rescue! Baby Angry had an umbrella for the whole company, and the weather machine took control of the weather ... until Om Nom played with it. Now he will have to find other ways to escape the rain! / Om Nom can be well-mannered even if he can't say 'Hello', 'Please', and 'Thank you'. It really is easy! A friendly smile and attention to the needs of neighbours and friends is all that he needs to have good manners. He is rewarded with beaming smiles and love all around. Helping friends is great! / When in good company or in a great mood, cleaning is fun! Armed with a mop, a brush, or a rug, Om Nom won't stop until everything is squeaky clean – and his friends will help! Baby Angry will once again show off her amazing strength, and Scientist-Nom will switch on her super boombox. Don't think twice, clean is nice!

programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Grandmas House
programme.desc: A teenager and her stepbrothers are forced to move in with Grandma. They learn the true meaning of love, faith, and family through the strict rules she imposes and the devotion she displays as the extended family has its ups and downs.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Mexico, two very different women become a bank robbery duo to fight a ruthless enforcer terrorizing their city.

programme.title: Spirit Riders
programme.desc: When a rebellious teen is arrested and sentenced to an equine therapy camp, she forms a connection with a spirited thoroughbred that she helps train with the guidance of the ranch's no-nonsense owner.

programme.title: Pinocchio
programme.desc: A retelling on the classic fairy-tale about the boy made of wood

programme.title: Christmas Angel
programme.desc: Ashley feels alone this Christmas as she searches fruitlessly for a job to support herself and her dog, Dash. But her neighbor Nick knows exactly what to do. He offers her a job as his assistant in the best work of all----helping others. There's only one catch: Ashley can't tell anyone that her boss is a sort of Secret Santa. When a nosy reporter, Will, takes interest in Ashley, she struggles to keep Nick's secret while protecting her heart.

programme.title: A Christmas of Wonders
programme.desc: Eliza, a writer for travel magazines and websites, has returned to her small hometown after an absence. Despite the passage of time, not much has changed in the town, and her family continues to participate in the same traditions. Through these activities, Eliza is reunited with Will, a former heartthrob, who helps her rediscover the significance of these family traditions.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla Bennett and Derek Dray are the hosts of Wake Up, Chicago and for the folks at home, their chemistry is undeniable. Derek is incredibly protective about the format of Wakeup, Chicago while Layla is always looking to shake things up. One morning they discover an adorable baby named Poppy left in a basket in Laylas dressing room. The mother passed away and the caretaker is unable to care for Poppy and is convinced that Layla and Derek will make perfect parents.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A local sheriff is unjustly accused of murder in a small town and forced to flee.

programme.title: Savage Land
programme.desc: When John Peterson finds his dead family he decides to take up the hunt for the perpetrators and take revenge on them.

programme.title: Apache Fury
programme.desc: A judge encounters a man (Frank Latimore) he once wronged after an Apache attack. The attack forces him, his fiancée and their fellow stagecoach passengers to take refuge at a rest stop.

programme.title: Tequila Joe
programme.desc: A young deputy tries to sober and revitalize a washed up, alcoholic sheriff to take down a pair of warring gangs of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: Christmas Matchmakers
programme.desc: Two hard-working executive assistants arrange for their bosses to fall in love during the holidays.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina and Franklin are seemingly the perfect couple, the toast of all their friends and married on Christmas Day five years ago, in a ceremony people still talk about. At Thanksgiving, they have a huge fight and trusts are broken -- they decide to divorce. Their divorce will be final on ChristmasDay.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature. However, as her research brings them closer together, she discovers there's more to him than meets the eye. Will she choose the man she thought she loved or the real-life embodiment of her fictional hero?

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Five years after her son was killed, Tess Ford is ready to live again. But a one-night romance with a handsome soldier throws her life back into chaos as the young man's attraction turns out to be a frightening obsession.

programme.title: Unknown Energies, Unidentified Emotions
programme.desc: A Foundation reporter, Isidor Dukas comes to the Institute to make a report. For the purpose of objective reporting, the Foundation uses agents with induced, synthetic identities. In confrontation with one of the test subjects, what was supposed to be a r

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: A paparazzi photo sparks a court case as a tabloid magazine spins a scandalous yarn over a painter and a famous singer.

programme.title: The Mirror
programme.desc: A dying man in his forties remembers his past. His childhood, his mother, the war, personal moments and things that tell of the recent history of all the Russian nation.

programme.title: Secret Workshops
programme.desc: A job as a seamstress tempts Juana, a young Bolivian woman, to neighbouring Argentina. Her husband and child remain behind in their homeland. It doesn't take long for the illusion of financial gain to burst – Juana is being exploited and must produce textiles for a luxury brand. Her employer's demands become ever more absurd, working conditions become unbearable. When her son becomes ill, Juana starts making plans to return, but as far as her employer is concerned, leaving is not an option.

programme.title: The Unvanquished
programme.desc: A boy leaves home to study in Calcutta, while his mother must face a life alone.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into Carmel, California, where he is soon introduced to the art-forgery community.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatization of the April 2010 disaster, when an oil well called Deepwater Horizon exploded causing the worst spill in US history.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In a world where the government records and taxes dreams, an unassuming dream auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageingeccentric. Albert Birney and Kentucker Audley's Strawberry Mansion is a cult classic in the making - a stylish, eccentric, thrilling and charmingly off-the-wall fantasy starring Kentucker Audley (Her Smell), Penny Fuller (All The President's Men), Grace Glowicki (Tito) and Reed Birney (Mass) - plus a fantastic hypnotic score from electronic musician Dan Deacon.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in this visually stunning fantasy adventure, in which pure good and evil battle to the death amidst spectacular surroundings. Set in a timeless mythical forest inhabited by fairies, goblins, unicorns, and mortals, the fantastic story has Tom Cruise as a mystical forest dweller chosen by fate to undertake a heroic quest. He must save a beautiful princess (Mia Sara) and defeat the demonic Lord of Darkness (Tim Curry), or the world will be plunged into a never-ending ice age.

programme.title: A Husband For Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers agree to a marriage of convenience, but an unrealized chemistry grows between them.

programme.title: Inconceivable
programme.desc: A woman interprets a kiss at a high school reunion as an invitation to follow her ex across the country and supplant his current family.

programme.title: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Jeri Jones runs the popular website ‘Bad Date Chronicles' where daters can go to anonymously post horrible date experiences. Realizing he's the subject of one of the posts, rival blogger Jack Collins dares Jeri to three dates in an attempt to prove he's not such a bad guy after all.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on the night of their high school reunion who, a decade after leaving school, still haven't quite grown up.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, decorated New Jersey detective Laurel Hester (Julianne Moore) wishes to leave her pension benefits to domestic partner Stacie Andree (Elliot Page).

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: A businessman is jolted out of his scripted life when he meets a single mother who cleans his office.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: A mechanic enlists the help of an attorney while trying to wrest custody of his daughters from his ex-wife.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

programme.title: A Miracle on Christmas Lake
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend on Christmas Eve, Bobby goes out onto the lake and makes a shocking discovery. When the land is bought, Bobby must rally the town to save it.

programme.title: On Angel Wings
programme.desc: One starry night, a shepherd boy is taken on a secret, magical night-flight to witness a Christmas miracle. Rachel is 8 and for the first time is allowed to join her brothers and sister to visit their grandfather, Amos, as he carries out his annual ritual of a night in the hills, where he worked as a young shepherd boy. Grandfather is delighted to see the children and a special bond is established between him and Rachel. He tells them how she reminds him of a magical night he then proceeds to recount it. He explains how, ahead of the other shepherds protecting their flock with him, he is flown away by the Angel Gabriel, to be the first visitor to the newly born Christ child. This magical re-working of the nativity by the leading writer Michael Morpurgo (War Horse, Private Peaceful) is rich with human poignancy as we share this very special experience.

programme.title: Feather Christmas
programme.desc: For single dad, and veterinarian, Martin, Christmas is all about upholding regular family traditions to keep the memory of his late wife alive. But when an ailing pet chicken arrives at his home-run animal sanctuary, the family's festive plans, and entire world, are turned upside down, as new love blossoms and spreads its wings!

programme.title: Joseph and Mary
programme.desc: During a time of much civil unrest, a holy man, Rabbi Elijah, swears an oath to protect the two young sons of a persecuted man. But while Jesus survives King Herod's slaughter of the innocents, it tragically claims the lives of the boys Elijah swore to protect.Seeking to avenge their deaths, he begins his quest for retribution. But when he meets Joseph, Mary and their young son Jesus, the anger that fuels his revenge is questioned. Elijah is faced with a life-changing choice: should he kill, or should he choose forgiveness, and in doing so, contradict every scripture upheld by his forefathers? With a powerful performance from Kevin Sorbo (Hercules, God's Not Dead), Joseph and Mary, is a stirring story of inspiration and hope, and of mercy versus revenge, set in the years before Jesus became the man who ultimately changed the course of humanity forever.

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Grumpy Cat, with 6m Facebook fans, stars in a Lifetime movie.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: The Senator
programme.desc: Starring Jason Clarke, Kate Mara and Ed Helms, this shocking political thriller follows a tragic web of lies that took hold of the Kennedy family and forever changed the course of US history. On July 18, 1969, Sen. Ted Kennedy drove his car off a bridge on Massachusetts Chappaquiddick Island, causing the death of Mary Jo Kopechne, a 28-year-old campaign strategist who worked for Kennedy.

programme.title: Pressure Point (PKA Heart of Champions)
programme.desc: Tough Army veteran, Coach Murphy (Shannon), arrives at the start of the new season to transform the status quo of a failing rowing team and unlock their true potential. With some tough love, can Coach Murphy inspire these young men to learn what it takes to be a team?

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris, assembling an all-star cast including Timothée Chalamet, Elle Fanning, Selena Gomez, Jude Law, Diego Luna and Liev Schreiber, for a charming, comedic tale set amidst the dizzying streets of The Big Apple, as romantic weekend plans are soon dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns to showers.

programme.title: Mr. Jones
programme.desc: A highly-compelling political thriller from award-winning director Agniezka Holland. Welsh journalist Gareth Jones (James Norton: Little Women) risks his life to expose the truth about the devastating famine in the Soviet Union in the early 1930s. Also starring Vanessa Kirby (The Crown) and Golden Globe Nominee Peter Sarsgaard (The Batman). This is the most important true story you will ever see.

programme.title: The Christmas Ball
programme.desc: A woman visits her Aunt in England for the holidays where she meets a handsome historian who is determined to promote her Aunt manor as a historical landmark. Starring Deirdre Mullins (2020)

programme.title: Twinkle All The Way
programme.desc: Two single parents grow closer as they contribute to each other's projects: a wedding and a VIP Christmas party. Starring Sarah Drew (2019)

programme.title: Christmas On The River
programme.desc: When a woman returns home to celebrate the anniversary of the town's Sugarcane Festival, she rediscovers the magic of Christmas. Starring Jana Kramer (2019)

programme.title: The Magical Christmas Shoe
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes help Noelle's rediscover her Christmas spirit and find love too. Starring Erin Karpluk (2019)

programme.title: The Magical Christmas Shoe
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes help Noelle's rediscover her Christmas spirit and find love too. Starring Erin Karpluk (2019)

programme.title: Love on Safari
programme.desc: Web designer Kira of Chicago inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa. There she meets head ranger Tom. Will she sell it and return to her accountant boyfriend Brad or...?

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: Hollywood star Alex accepts a prom proposal from David an unpopular high school student, to help rebuild her profile. Alex will soon discover the Heidi has a crush on David. (2016)

programme.title: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts?

programme.title: Love On Repeat
programme.desc: When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realizes she is stuck in limbo and must finally decide what it will take to make her truly happy. Starring Jen Lilley (2019)

programme.title: Snapshot Of Love
programme.desc: Adrian is a Hollywood paparazzi assigned to get photos of a very elusive star, Parker Bennett. Little does she know, she'll get her chance when they both end up at the same BnB in the mountains of NC.

programme.title: ON THE NIGHT OF THE FIRE
programme.desc: Kobling is a barber who steals ¬£100 to pay off his wife's debt. When the police trace the stolen notes to him, and someone is killed, Kobling goes into his hiding and sends his wife and child away. Will he be able to elude the police?

programme.title: THE DARK MAN
programme.desc: A peaceful seaside village is shocked by a sudden and vicious double murder when a beautiful young actress informs the police that she may able to identify the killer.

programme.title: DOCTOR AT SEA
programme.desc: Simon sets off for the sea aboard a steamship where he encounters eccentric characters.

programme.title: DOCTOR IN LOVE
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot Spratt gives his medical students a slating to remember over a patient. The patient is Dr Richard Hare, a student who has fallen ill with jaundice and, in love with the enticing Night Nurse!

programme.title: DOCTOR IN THE HOUSE
programme.desc: Comedy. Medical student Simon Sparrow deals with the issues of working in a hospital.

programme.title: How to Be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: Eugenio Derbez (INSTRUCTIONS NOT INCLUDED) heads an all-star cast in this uproariously funny comedy! When aging Latin lover Maximo (Derbez) is suddenly dumped by the older woman he married for money, he moves in with his estranged sister Sara (Salma Hayek) and her 10-year-old son, Hugo.

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: The Love Punch
programme.desc: THE LOVE PUNCH brings together Pierce Brosnan and Emma Thompson for the first time, as ex-husband and wife Richard and Kate whose biting banter suggests that the flames of their former relationship have not been fully extinguished…

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Chill Factor
programme.desc: A new biological chemical weapon that explodes up to temperatures over fifty degrees Fahrenheit, falls into the hands of two men who try to make sure that it doesn't get stolen by a terrorist.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: In this made-for-TV movie, two brothers who battled on opposing sides of the Civil War return home at the end of the war to discover that their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: He's the best there is, in fact, he's the only one there is! He's Ace Ventura Pet Detective, on the case to find the Miami Dolphins' missing mascot and quarterback Dan Marino. He goes eyeball to eyeball with a man-eating shark, stakes out the Miami Dolphins and woos and wows the ladies. Whether he's undercover, under fire or underwater, he always gets his man...or beast.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Slipaway
programme.desc: When a homeless young musician moves into a sailboat with a feisty elderly widow, the two must overcome their differences and haunting pasts to unlock each other's dreams.

programme.title: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In every person's life, there is a moment when we discover what true success is. Edward is learning that lesson later in life, but thankfully not too late. Edward finds hope and inspiration in what he considered unlikely sources.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom.

programme.title: Born to Race
programme.desc: Born To Race is the story of Danny Krueger, a rebellious young street racer on a collision course with trouble. After an accident at an illegal street race, he is sent to a small town to live with his estranged father, a washed up NASCAR racer.

programme.title: Born to Race: Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival.

programme.desc: Germany, May 1945, deep in the Harz Mountains a U.S. tank crew discovers a platoon of Germans preparing to ambush U.S. supply trucks. A deadly game of cat and mouse quickly unfolds as the Americans find themselves out-gunned and out-manned by three German tanks.

programme.title: Mortdecai

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest
programme.desc: Adventure Ocean Quest - Season 1 - The great white Sharks of Guadalupe: The great white shark has a fearsome reputation and diving with them is definitely a risky business. He wants to get to the bottom of the sharks' secretive migrations and their interactions with other species, including humans.

programme.title: The Rise to Power
programme.desc: At the end of a bloody civil war, Francisco Franco seized power and ruled Spain with an iron hand for nearly four decades. Under his leadership the conservative, monarchist armed forces staged a coup against Spain's republican government which had been democratically elected.

programme.title: The New Regime
programme.desc: The Franco myth stands for a cruel regime: for the darkest chapter in Spanish history. Franco gave himself the title of Caudillo de España - Supreme Leader of Spain. He created his own rituals of power: the war hero, the family man, and the mass murderer. Franco was a man of many faces.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The rains have finally arrived in the Kalahari and the vast desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this small group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: In another cruel twist Cleo's young pup Ophelia got left behind on a foraging trip and was killed by one of the Kalahari's most dangerous creatures, a Goshawk. The remaining three pups: Zeus, Daisy and Flo have lost their dear sister and playmate and this is causing high levels of insecurity.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina gets to tick off one of her bucket list dreams – the majestic Victoria Falls. Her guide Beano walks her through the history of the falls formation and they encounter some of the wildlife that live in the surrounding area. She zip-lines across the gorge and learns the integral role vultures play in the ecosystem.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still at Victoria Falls, Kristina is treated to an aerial view of the Victoria falls. She gets up close and personal with prehistoric-looking beasts at the croc sanctuary, experiences some of the must-do tourist activities and has her first-ever encounter with endangered black rhino at the Stanley and Livingstone Private Game Reserve.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Guided by Sean, Kristina explores the Matusadona National Park where they have incredible on-foot encounters with elephants and lions. Will she keep her cool as she comes face-to-face with one of Africa's apex predators?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg forces the students to attend a local Heritage Festival – something none of them are in the mood for on their ‘day off'. But will their attitudes change after witnessing the South African dance and folk customs?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: The group discovers Roxanne's childhood fear of lizards. Niven takes the opportunity to exploit it.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Agatha is feeling motivated again only to learn that she actually failed her exams and must leave the residency.

programme.title: Endangered with Michaela Strachan
programme.desc: Seeks to find the rare and endangered species of South Africa and establish what we need to do to conserve them. Documenting and recording the status of our endangered species by region.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmakers often risk life and limb trying to capture unique images of their dangerous protagonists. In the Kruger National Park Josef Jozefowicz steps into a lionesses' den to film her cubs, in Alaska Andreas Kieling mingles with giant elk bulls in order to film them in action, and in Florida his colleague Zoltan Török gets very close to an alligator mother guarding its nest. The life of the film-makers is also threatened by elemental forces, and failing technical equipment: the strong and tearing current of the Yukon River throws Andreas Kieling's boat onto a gravel bank, in the Democratic Republik of Congo camerawoman Heike Grebe is separated from her colleagues in the dense rainforest, in Kamchatka a film team only just escapes a gigantic landslide, and in Finland a hot-air balloon catches fire and becomes the nightmare of Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg. The last episode "Wild Moments - Dangerous and Deadly" follows wildlife film-makers on their adventurous journeys throughout the world.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: King of the Seas
programme.desc: The times where eagles have been seen as varmints are over. They are now perceived as an integral part of the food cycle. Due to the fact that the habitats of the sea eagles in Germany are largely found in the north-eastern regions that are rich in water, the movie accompanies the eagles to an island, home to hundreds of sea ravens, where they rob the baby sea ravens of their food. They seem to always profit from the successes of the fellow creatures in their habitats. This film introduces you to the expert poachers of the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: As an animal filmmaker, one often deals with lots of strange old birds. No wonder, that so much can go wrong. After a long day of filming, a surprise awaits at the camp: Wolves have been looking for chocolate biscuits! Yet these are not the only things that can happen in the Arctic. Yann Sochaczewski is out and about in the magnificent Grand Canyon. On his raft on the Colorado River, he risks life and limb in doing so. In Australia, Thoralf Grospitz and Jens Westphalen play cat and mouse with an odd bird, that turns out to be a real entertainer. In the Serengeti, Reinhard Radke despairs of the many tourists who constantly walk in front of his lens. Wildlife filmmakers travel around the world for these very encounters. They bring nature into our living rooms, experience the beautiful, the saddest and the most poignant moments. And many funny ones.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: When humans and wild animals live next door to one another, things can sometimes be a little hairy. Some organise themselves in impertinent gangs, others mutually cultivate their own friendships. In New Zealand, keas organise themselves into gangs and obviously have it in for all the rubber seals belonging to winter sports enthusiasts. Their motto: nibble all you can. In Australia, Klaus Weißmann and Rolf Sziringer struggle with a huge invasion. Thousands of flies have taken a liking to the two men. This causes frayed nerves. And in Zambia, Jens Westphalen and Thoralf Grospitz capture a veritable display of elephants with the camera. Every year, their fine noses lead them into a hotel garden - in which the fruits on the wild mango tree are ripe. But, there is a catch: To get to their picnic, they have to walk through the lobby. This is what happens when buildings are erected around even older premises.

programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder. (S5 E05)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis (S5 E06)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season. (S5 E07)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights. (S5 E08)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category. (S5 E09)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”! (S5 E10)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof? (S5 E11)
